text:
This is fixed in 11.0-current.

Aug  3 15:18:23 darkstar kernel: umass1:7:1: Attached to scbus7

Aug  3 15:18:23 darkstar kernel: da4: <Kingston DataTraveler 112 1.00> Removable Direct Access SCSI-2 device
Aug  3 15:18:23 darkstar kernel: da4: Serial Number 123456789
Aug  3 15:18:23 darkstar kernel: da4: 40.000MB/s transfers
